description_long: This is a small, two-story brick bakery building with a curved corner facade and a flat concrete roof. The exterior is primarily constructed of reddish-orange bricks, with a prominent gray awning above the entrance and a red downspout running vertically along the wall. There is a large, blank wooden signboard mounted on the upper front, and a sidewalk sign stands near the entrance. The side of the building features a covered service area with a corrugated roof and a wall-mounted air conditioning unit. Windows are present on both levels, with the lower level featuring a display window and the upper level having a barred window. The overall design is compact and urban, suitable for placement along a city street.
description: A compact, two-story brick bakery with a curved facade, gray awning, and sidewalk sign, featuring a covered side area and urban architectural details.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, gray awning, large wooden signboard, and sidewalk sign.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the uninterrupted brick wall and the flat concrete roof, with minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the brick wall and the edge of the awning, with a glimpse of the covered side area.
description_view_3: Rear and side view showing the covered service area with a corrugated roof, wall-mounted air conditioning unit, and the red downspout.
attribute_storefront_signage: There is a large, rectangular wooden signboard mounted above the awning on the curved front facade. The signboard is blank, with no visible text, logos, or graphics. There is also a sidewalk sign near the entrance, but it is blank as well.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A gray, angled awning is present above the entrance, made of what appears to be metal or composite material. There is no visible bakery branding, logos, text, or patterns on the awning.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features a utilitarian, urban commercial style with a curved brick facade, flat concrete roof, and minimal decorative elements. The design is functional and typical of small city bakeries, with industrial touches such as the exposed air conditioning unit and metal awning.
